articles.title: Trump says US forces will ‘finish the job’ soon in first prime-time speech since starting Iran war
articles.description:
Trump offered a full-throated defense of the war Wednesday night in his first national address since the conflict began more than a month ago.

The post Trump says US forces will ‘finish the job’ soon in first prime-time speech since starting Iran war appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump stated US forces will 'finish the job' in Iran conflict during his April 1 speech.
The conflict has been ongoing for over a month, affecting national security discussions.
Boston residents may face increased military presence and heightened security measures locally.

articles.title: ​The 2026 Red Sox’ run prevention approach has been a disaster out of the gate
articles.description:
"We have time on our side, but there’s urgency, for sure, that this is unacceptable.”

The post ​The 2026 Red Sox’ run prevention approach has been a disaster out of the gate appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox' run prevention strategy has struggled significantly since the start of the 2026 season.
Pitching issues highlighted by poor performances from key players like Garrett Crochet.
Fans express concern over team's future performance and competitiveness in MLB.

articles.title: ‘Bob’s Burgers’ actor Eugene Mirman rescued from fiery crash by N.H. governor’s detail
articles.description:
Mirman is known for voicing musical middle child Gene Belcher on the animated comedy “Bob’s Burgers.” The crash remains under investigation.

The post ‘Bob’s Burgers’ actor Eugene Mirman rescued from fiery crash by N.H. governor’s detail appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Eugene Mirman, 'Bob's Burgers' actor, was rescued from a fiery crash in New Hampshire.
The incident involved a vehicle fire and is currently under investigation by authorities.
Mirman's rescue highlights the quick response of the New Hampshire governor's security detail.

articles.title: Brown scores 43, Tatum has triple-double, and Celtics run away from Heat, 147-129
articles.description:
The Celtics rode the strength of a record-setting first quarter to beat the Miami Heat 147-129 on Wednesday night.

The post Brown scores 43, Tatum has triple-double, and Celtics run away from Heat, 147-129 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics defeated the Miami Heat 147-129 on Wednesday night.
Jaylen Brown scored 43 points, while Jayson Tatum recorded a triple-double.
This victory boosts Celtics' playoff positioning, energizing local fans ahead of the postseason.
